title: Make a Donation
metaDescription: Support the Fatima Literacy Association with a secure online donation. 100% of your donation goes directly to students.
heroDescription: Every rupee counts. Your donation helps children in Mahebourg access education, meals, and a brighter future.
formNicHelp: Required by MRA for donation tax deduction (up to Rs 100,000/year)
securityNote: Secure payment by Peach Payments. Your banking details are never stored on our website.
trustBadge: 100% of your donation goes to students
bankTransferDescription: You can also donate directly via MCB Juice or your banking app.
successMessage: Your contribution makes a real difference in the lives of our students. A confirmation receipt has been sent to your email.
successTaxReceipt: Your NSIF tax receipt will be sent within 48 hours.
failedMessage: Your payment could not be processed. No amount has been charged.
failedBankAlternative: You can also make a donation by bank transfer.
